title: Create a task with deterministic IDs
task: Find the code path that creates a task and assigns its deterministic id.

expectedFacts.text: Task creation validates that the title is not empty or whitespace-only.
Task creation assigns deterministic IDs such as task-1 and task-2.
A newly created task is stored with completed set to false.

forbiddenWrongClaims: New tasks are completed by default.
answerKey.notes: A correct answer must identify deterministic ID assignment and the creation path.

promptComplexityHint: single operation with storage side effect
projectComplexityRelevance: uses service and store files in single-language projects and boundary files in the mixed project
notes: The creation path should be obvious and small across all projects.

title: Complete an existing task
task: Locate the code path that completes a task by id.

expectedFacts.text: Completion locates the matching task by id.
Completion marks the matching task as completed.
Completion does not mark unrelated tasks as completed.

forbiddenWrongClaims: completeTask marks every task as completed.
answerKey.notes: A correct answer must distinguish targeted completion from list or delete behavior.

projectComplexityRelevance: primarily service logic, with mixed project boundary coverage
notes: Completion must flip the completed flag for the targeted task.

title: List open tasks only
task: Identify the logic that returns only incomplete tasks.

expectedFacts.text: Open-task listing returns tasks where completed is false.
Open-task listing is separate from list-all task behavior.
Open-task listing returns task objects with id, title, and completed fields.

answerKey.notes: A correct answer must identify filtering on incomplete tasks.

projectComplexityRelevance: service-level filter with no storage mutation
notes: Open-task listing should remain separate from list-all behavior.

title: Summarize task counts
task: Find the summary logic that reports total, open, and completed counts.

expectedFacts.text: Task summary reports the total task count.
Task summary reports the open task count.
Task summary reports the completed task count.

answerKey.notes: A correct answer must identify the total, open, and completed fields.

projectComplexityRelevance: tests aggregation logic across single-language and mixed-language projects
notes: Summary shape must stay aligned across every benchmark project.

title: Reject an empty task title
task: Locate the validation that rejects blank task titles.
query: empty title validation create task blank title

expectedFacts.text: Title validation rejects empty or whitespace-only task titles.
Title validation is part of the create task path.
Invalid titles produce a clear deterministic error instead of creating a task.

forbiddenWrongClaims: Blank titles are silently converted to Untitled.
answerKey.notes: A correct answer must locate validation and explain the rejected blank title behavior.

projectComplexityRelevance: requires reading creation logic rather than only public exports
notes: Validation errors should be clear and deterministic.
